content.full_text:
May 22, 2007

Randon Lane
Murrieta Planning Commissioner
41798 Pioneer Street
Murrieta, California 92562

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-079

Dear Mr. Lane:

This letter responds to your request for advice regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 Per our telephone conversation of May 15, 2007, you have withdrawn your request for advice. Should you need assistance in the future, please do not hesitate to contact us.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

[Signature]
By: Heather M. Rowan
Counsel, Legal Division

HMR:jgl
I:\AdviceLtrs\07-079

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
